      Methods in org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.client.api.standalone that return types with arguments of type StandaloneRuleDetails 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      Collection<StandaloneRuleDetails> StandaloneSonarLintEngine.getAllRuleDetails()
      Deprecated.
      use RulesService.listAllStandaloneRulesDefinitions() instead
      Optional<StandaloneRuleDetails> StandaloneSonarLintEngine.getRuleDetails​(String ruleKey)
      Deprecated.
      use RulesService.listAllStandaloneRulesDefinitions() and RulesService.getStandaloneRuleDetails(GetStandaloneRuleDescriptionParams) instead
